name: Ethiopia Yirgacheffe
longNotes: Classic washed profile: luminous florals, tea-like body, and a clean citrus sweetness that lingers. Lovely as pour-over.

name: Colombia Huila
longNotes: Balanced and comforting with a caramelized sweetness and soft acidity—an easy crowd-pleaser for first-time tasters.

name: Sumatra Mandheling
longNotes: Full body and low brightness, with herbal depth and a long, smoky finish. Best when you want something bold on the table.
